channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 11.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): ‘It is unsustainable’: Reform’s billionaire donors inspire panic in Westminster

item.title: BBC Politics: Henry Nowak deserves legacy that goes beyond tragedy, says PM
item.description: Henry Nowak deserves legacy that goes beyond tragedy, says PM

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Starmer accuses Musk of trying to ‘whip up division’ in UK over Henry Nowak murder
item.description: Starmer accuses Musk of trying to ‘whip up division’ in UK over Henry Nowak murder

item.title: The Guardian: ‘I wouldn’t flinch’: Burnham on social care, markets, Brexit – and the prospect of a general election - The Guardian
item.description: ‘I wouldn’t flinch’: Burnham on social care, markets, Brexit – and the prospect of a general election - The Guardian

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Keir Starmer hits out at Elon Musk for ‘trying to whip up division’ in UK over Henry Nowak’s murder
item.description: Keir Starmer hits out at Elon Musk for ‘trying to whip up division’ in UK over Henry Nowak’s murder

item.title: i Politics: The secret texts embarrassing Cabinet ministers - and there's more
